task.issue: Section 199A QBI deduction applicability for SSTB sole-prop above MFJ threshold; planning posture.

analysis: MFJ 2024 threshold: phase-in $383,900-$483,900 (verify year-specific Rev. Proc.). Couple's $290K taxable income before QBI is below the lower threshold, so SSTB classification (accounting per Treas. Reg. §1.199A-5(b)(2)(iv)) is irrelevant; full 20% QBI deduction available. W-2/UBIA limits also do not apply below threshold.
conclusion: Section 199A 20% deduction available on full $215,000 of Schedule C net income, subject to overall 20% × (TI − net cap gains) limitation. Estimated deduction: 20% × $215,000 = $43,000.
band_rationale: Below-threshold posture is dispositive; SSTB and W-2/UBIA limits inapplicable. Year-specific threshold should be verified via Rev. Proc.

public_laws_consulted.popular_name: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017
